description: Card on a plain white background reproducing a Donald Trump social-media post. The layout has a circular avatar at top-left showing a stylized American-flag-painted face, the bold name 'Donald J. Trump' with a magenta verification badge and black subscription badge, and the handle '@realDonaldTrump' beneath. The body text in black sans-serif reads: 'The Dow Jones Industrial Average just hit 50,000 for the first time in History. CONGRATULATIONS AMERICA!' The tweet caption reads 'Trust in Trump.' followed by a money-with-wings emoji.
notable_text: The Dow Jones Industrial Average just hit 50,000 for the first time in History. CONGRATULATIONS AMERICA! / (caption) Trust in Trump.
